description: Declarative manifest of all Poly Haven assets required by SimSoviet 1917. Run `pnpm tsx scripts/fetch-polyhaven.ts sync` to download missing assets.

hdris.notes: Primary winter IBL. Soft overcast snow light. Already in project from Poly Haven (manual download).
Transitional season IBL. Park with melting snow.
Summer/warm IBL despite the name. Bright clear sky.
Clear African night sky with visible Milky Way. Perfect starfield for Moon/asteroid settlements.
Pure starfield — no ground, no horizon. Deep space, orbital habitats, Dyson interior.
Warm golden-hour sky. Post-permafrost Earth (warming era). Also Green Mars (terraformed atmosphere).
Industrial overcast with visible structures. Orbital platform / megastructure construction era.
NEEDED: Partly cloudy night with warm horizon glow. Tinted orange, reads as thin Martian atmosphere at dusk.
NEEDED: Sunset with blue/orange gradient. Blue Mars — fully terraformed, Earth-like but with alien sunset colors.
NEEDED: Urban night with artificial lighting. MegaEarth undercity — perpetual artificial night between arcology layers.

textures.notes: Standard grass for temperate Earth. Already in project from AmbientCG.
Snow ground cover. Already in project from AmbientCG.
Gray cracked dry regolith with scattered pebbles. Lunar surface.
Pinkish-brown fine dust with rock fragments. Red Mars iron oxide regolith. Matches Curiosity rover photos.
Dense green moss. Green Mars — first lichen/moss covering the regolith during terraforming.
Dark galvanized steel with crystal grain. Orbital platforms, Dyson swarm panels, space station floors.
Green crystalline cracked ice. Titan methane ice, ice age Earth, frozen seas.
Orange-red cracked earth. Permafrost collapse era — thawing ground. Already in project.
NEEDED: Hot volcanic rock. Venus surface — golden/orange basalt under crushing atmosphere.
NEEDED: Alien desert sand. Exoplanet desert variant — tinted differently from Earth sand.
NEEDED: Wet beach sand with water edge. Blue Mars — new oceans forming on terraformed surface.

shaders.notes: PLANNED: Procedural shader — curved metal panels stretching to horizon, Sun visible through gaps, parallax depth. Not a Poly Haven asset — custom Three.js ShaderMaterial.
PLANNED: Butterscotch/salmon sky shader for Mars. Rayleigh scattering in thin CO2 atmosphere. Transitions from red (thin) to blue (thick) as terraforming progresses.
PLANNED: Interior of rotating cylinder habitat. Artificial sun stripe, curved landscape wrapping overhead, alternating land/window panels.
